prompt: I need a utility function that deduplicates a list of user-uploaded image URLs and validates their accessibility. Invalid URLs should be filtered out and logged. Write the spec first, then implement it.

assertions.text: Spec is generated before the implementation (spec-driven development flow)
Spec includes a function signature definition
Spec covers edge cases (empty list, all duplicates, malformed URLs, network timeout)
Implementation follows the behavior defined in the spec
Spec does not write any files to the project source directory
Spec stays at function granularity (does not inflate into a module-level design doc)
